title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
